description:
Meet Haze — a tiny robot friend that lives on your screen.

WHAT'S NEW IN 2.0
• Brand-new Haze V3 face with smoother, more expressive animations
• Optional on-device AI chat — talk to Haze without sending data to the cloud
• Personality modes that change how Haze responds
• Focus and meditation timers with cute robot encouragement
• Feelings Game to practice recognizing emotions
• Sound effects library and installed TTS voice picker
• New sad and scared expressions
• Settings that persist between sessions

EXPRESSIVE & INTERACTIVE
• Tap, drag, and play with animated robot faces
• Multiple face styles: Classic, LOOI-inspired, Minimal, Bean Face, and V3
• Full color customization for eyes and mouth
• Automatic blinking for lifelike behavior

CUSTOMIZE YOUR HAZE
• Choose colors, face style, voice, language, sounds, and theme
• English and Portuguese built in
• Hide controls for a distraction-free experience

PRIVACY FIRST
• No accounts, ads, tracking, or personal data collection
• Optional AI runs entirely on your device
• All settings stored locally on your device
promotionalText: Haze 2.0: on-device AI chat, focus timers, Feelings Game, and the new V3 face!
whatsNew: Haze 2.0 is a huge upgrade: meet the new Haze V3 face, optional on-device AI chat, personality modes, focus and meditation timers, sound effects, the Feelings Game, saved settings, better voice controls, and new sad and scared expressions.
